title: Kometa Collection File
description: Schema for Kometa collection files. These files define Plex collections using builders, filters, and metadata updates.

collections-map.title: collections
collections-map.description: A mapping of collection names to their definitions.

template.description: Template(s) to use for this definition.

blank_collection.description: Create the collection with no builders and no items.

build_collection.description: When false, collection won't be created but items can still go to Radarr/Sonarr.

cache_builders.description: Number of days to cache builder results. 0 = no cache.

changes_webhooks.description: Override the changes webhook for just this definition.

default_percent.description: Default percent for episode/season/track/album special filters.

delete_collections_named.description: Delete Plex collections with these names.

hub_priority.description: Priority position for this collection's Recommendation Hub row. Lower numbers appear first.

name.description: Override the collection name in Plex.

name_mapping.description: Folder name in the Image Assets Directory.

sync_to_trakt_list.description: Trakt list slug to sync this definition to.

smart_label.description: Make this a Smart Label Collection.

plex_all.description: Get every item in the library.

plex_watchlist.description: Get every item in your Watchlist, sorted by the given option.

plex_pilots.description: Get the first episode of every show. Requires builder_level: episode.

tmdb_collection_details.description: TMDb Collection ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches summary/poster/background.

tmdb_movie_details.description: TMDb Movie ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches summary/poster/background.

tmdb_show_details.description: TMDb Show ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches summary/poster/background.

tmdb_list_details.description: TMDb List ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches description.

tmdb_actor.description: TMDb Person ID(s) to build from their acting credits.

tmdb_director.description: TMDb Person ID(s) to build from their directing credits.

tmdb_producer.description: TMDb Person ID(s) to build from their producing credits.

tmdb_writer.description: TMDb Person ID(s) to build from their writing credits.

tmdb_crew.description: TMDb Person ID(s) to build from their crew credits.

tmdb_actor_details.description: TMDb Person ID(s) for acting credits. Also fetches person info.

tmdb_crew_details.description: TMDb Person ID(s) for crew credits. Also fetches person info.

tmdb_director_details.description: TMDb Person ID(s) for directing credits. Also fetches person info.

tmdb_producer_details.description: TMDb Person ID(s) for producing credits. Also fetches person info.

tmdb_writer_details.description: TMDb Person ID(s) for writing credits. Also fetches person info.

tmdb_popular.description: Number of popular TMDb movies/shows to get.

tmdb_top_rated.description: Number of top-rated TMDb movies/shows to get.

tmdb_now_playing.description: Number of now-playing TMDb movies to get.

tmdb_upcoming.description: Number of upcoming TMDb movies to get.

tmdb_airing_today.description: Number of airing-today TMDb shows to get.

tmdb_on_the_air.description: Number of on-the-air TMDb shows to get.

tmdb_trending_daily.description: Number of daily trending TMDb items to get.

tmdb_trending_weekly.description: Number of weekly trending TMDb items to get.

tmdb_discover.description: TMDb Discover search. Uses TMDb's Discover API with movie or show search attributes.

tvdb_list_details.description: TVDb List URL(s). Also fetches description.

tvdb_show_details.description: TVDb Series ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches summary/poster/background.

tvdb_movie_details.description: TVDb Movie ID(s) or URL(s). Also fetches summary/poster/background.

trakt_list_details.description: Trakt List URL(s). Also fetches description.

trakt_boxoffice.description: Get Trakt's Top Box Office movies (always 10).

radarr_taglist.description: Get Radarr movies by tag(s). Leave blank for untagged movies.

sonarr_taglist.description: Get Sonarr shows by tag(s). Leave blank for untagged shows.

mdblist_list.description: MDBList List URL(s) or object with url and limit.

letterboxd_list_details.description: Letterboxd List URL(s). Also fetches description.

letterboxd_user_films_details.description: Letterboxd user films page(s). Also fetches details.

letterboxd_user_reviews_details.description: Letterboxd user reviews page(s). Also fetches details.

icheckmovies_list_details.description: ICheckMovies List URL(s). Also fetches description.

mojo_world.description: BoxOfficeMojo worldwide chart for a given year.

mojo_record.description: BoxOfficeMojo record chart (opening weekend, per-theater averages, etc.).

mojo_never.description: BoxOfficeMojo 'Never in the Top N' chart.

simkl_trending.description: Simkl trending titles. Integer limit or object with period and limit.

simkl_dvd.description: Simkl DVD releases. Integer limit or object with limit.

text_file.description: Path(s) to a plain-text file containing one IMDb/TMDb/TVDb ID per line.

anidb_id.description: AniDB ID(s). Accepts integer, comma-separated string, or array.

anidb_relation.description: AniDB ID to get all relations of.

anidb_popular.description: Number of items from AniDB's popular anime list (max 30).

anidb_tag.description: AniDB Tag(s) to build from. Accepts tag ID, string name, dict with tag_id/limit, or array.

anidb_tag_name.description: AniDB Tag(s) by name. Accepts string, dict with tags/min_weight, or array.

anilist_id.description: AniList ID(s). Accepts integer, comma-separated string, or array.

anilist_relations.description: AniList ID to get all relations of.

item_label.description: Apply label(s) to all items found by builders.

item_tmdb_season_titles.description: Update season titles from TMDb for matched shows.

revert_overlay.description: Revert overlays on items in this collection.

item_analyze.description: Trigger Plex analysis (chapter images, etc.) on matched items.

item_lock_background.description: Lock/unlock background art on matched items.

item_lock_poster.description: Lock/unlock poster art on matched items.

item_lock_square_art.description: Lock/unlock square art on matched items.

item_lock_title.description: Lock/unlock title field on matched items.

item_critic_rating.description: Set critic rating on matched items (0.0–10.0, null to clear).

item_audience_rating.description: Set audience rating on matched items (0.0–10.0, null to clear).

item_user_rating.description: Set user rating on matched items (0.0–10.0, null to clear).

non_item_remove_label.description: Remove label(s) from items NOT in this collection.

item_edition.description: Set edition field on matched items (null to clear).

item_radarr_tag.description: Append Radarr tag(s) to matched items.

item_sonarr_tag.description: Append Sonarr tag(s) to matched items.

item_album_sorting.description: Set album sort order for matched artist items (music libraries).

url_square_art.description: URL of a square-art image to apply to the collection.

file_square_art.description: Local path to a square-art image.

icheckmovies_description.description: ICheckMovies list URL to pull a collection description from.

suppress_overlays.description: Overlay name(s) to suppress on items in this collection.

album_sorting.description: Default album sort order for this library (music libraries).

asset_folders.description: Use per-item asset sub-folders instead of a flat asset directory.

append_label.description: Append label(s) to matched items without replacing existing labels.

variables.description: Template variable overrides for this collection block.

allowed_library_types.description: Library type(s) this collection is restricted to.

tmdb_deathday.description: TMDb person death-date used in template conditionals.

filters.description: Filters applied to items found by builders.

mojo-intl-range-entry.description: mojo_international — international box-office chart for a specific time range.

mojo-record-entry.description: mojo_record — one of BoxOfficeMojo's named record charts (opening weekend, per-theater averages, etc.).

mojo-never-entry.description: mojo_never — top-grossing films that never cracked the Top 1/5/10.

simkl-trending-entry.description: simkl_trending object form — period + optional limit.
